_comment: Hand-maintained supplement to ~/.claude/manifest.json for brain-map/generate.py. manifest.json is the live source for the skill list and calls: edges; everything here is data manifest.json doesn't and shouldn't capture (prose, non-skill nodes, hook/cron wiring, category grouping, expandable sub-forests).

root.desc: Memory, routing, and skills layer for Claude Code

children.desc: ChromaDB — patterns/anti-patterns/worked/failed, tagged by domain
Scans a project on demand, extracts patterns
Lateral + direct retrieval — creative's cross-domain synthesis reads this
Manual pattern capture; shared by the session-capture hook
ChromaDB — arXiv/GitHub/HN items, deduped by URL hash
ChromaDB — citation-graph traversal results, deduped across investigations
Greedy best-first traversal, blended SPECTER2+nomic-embed scoring, now its own repo
References+citations from Semantic Scholar, asymmetric caps + result-intent bypass
Shared vocabulary, loaded every session
Auto-generated skill index — this graph's real source of truth

structural.desc: The hooks wiring everything else together

children.desc: Rebuilds manifest.json from skill frontmatter — now path-scoped, not unconditional
Hook: prints the resume prompt on handoff-doc writes
Hook: extracts decisions from handoffs into qa-knowledge
Hook: scans the handoff's project, queues top issues

structural.desc: Run on a schedule, without being invoked

children.desc: Cron 08:30 — brainstorms feature combos, trim candidates, wild ideas
part of its assembled context
part of its assembled context
the actual output — was silently broken until tonight
Cron 09:00 — source_monitor → correlate → digest
fetches arXiv CS.AI/CS.LG/CS.MA, GitHub, HN
cross-refs against qa-knowledge, cosine distance < 1.1
synthesizes into Directly Relevant / Lateral / Tools / Skip

skill_desc_overrides.grill-me: Relentless Socratic interview — now the fallback
skill_desc_overrides.grill-with-docs: grill-me + live CONTEXT.md/ADR updates — the preferred default
skill_desc_overrides.architecture-review: Reviews the whole system — renamed from self-optimize tonight

synapse_labels.grill-with-docs->grill-me: calls grill-me's interview process, then layers doc-updates on top
synapse_labels.grill-with-docs->lexicon: calls lexicon to resolve/record terms as they crystallize
synapse_labels.improve-codebase-architecture->zoom-out: calls zoom-out for the initial map before finding deepening opportunities
synapse_labels.index->self-improve: runs self-improve's retrieve.py + rebuild-manifest.py under the hood
synapse_labels.qa-agent->self-improve: calls self-improve to turn QA-observed patterns into new/updated skills
synapse_labels.self-improve->lexicon: calls lexicon — step 1 of its own process
synapse_labels.self-improve->write-a-skill: calls write-a-skill's process when authoring a brand-new skill
synapse_labels.tdd->diagnose: calls diagnose when a red test needs root-causing, not just a fix
synapse_labels.to-prd->to-issues: calls to-issues once the PRD is synthesized
synapse_labels.triage->to-issues: calls to-issues once an item is triaged

extra_synapses.label: qa_scan.py/qa_capture.py write scan results and manual captures here — qa-agent's core purpose, previously missing from this graph entirely
cross_domain_synthesis.py directly imports qa_query.py and reads this — not a qa-agent invocation, bypasses it entirely; never declared in frontmatter
PostToolUse hook fires on every handoff-doc write
PostToolUse hook fires on every handoff-doc write
PostToolUse hook fires on every handoff-doc write
rewrites manifest.json on every relevant SKILL.md/memory edit
owns and triggers the daily-digest cron
reads qa-knowledge as part of its assembled context
correlate.py cross-refs today's finds against qa-knowledge
source_monitor.py writes here, correlate.py reads it back
paper_graph.py's /paper-graph mode writes and reads here — added 2026-07-08, previously missing from this graph entirely (same gap class as qa-agent above)
